title: Analyze quadrilaterals
description: Classify and compare rectangles, rhombuses, and squares.
topic_path: Module 7: Geometry and measurement word problems
Topic B: Attributes of two-dimensional figures

assessment_items.question_content:
The following shapes all belong to the same group.

 |  | 
- | - | -
![A four-sided shape. Each side is labeled 6 centimeters. The corners of the shape are not right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/baad14de1b84496e7058770952097bf91fb2eeb7) | ![A four-sided shape. Each side is labeled 8 meters. The corners of the shape are right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4de2f05ba3998111417aaccadd4e89b34b9ecf63) | ![A four-sided shape. The top and bottom sides are labeled 7 meters. The left and right sides are labeled 3 meters. The corners of the shape are right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a67c61f5aa44830b8fdde996724e665ebae403d9)

All of the shapes have $4$ sides and $4$ angles.

**Which of the following shapes belongs in the group?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Which of the shapes also has $4$ sides and $4$ angles?

This shape belongs in the group:

[[☃ image 1]]

choices.content: ![A six-sided shape. Each side is labeled 9 meters.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/36770fa75ed89b335e85191f275e8a173bcada44)

![A four-sided shape. The top side is labeled 3 centimeters, the bottom side is labeled 5 centimeters, the left side is labeled 4 centimeters,  and the right side is labeled 6 centimeters.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/94d0bfff17b21633362364c9f7779a13cdcbed80)
![A six-sided shape. Each side is labeled 8 meters.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8a3f229a38f2a8481821432f47875cfcef0e2e5b)
![A three-sided shape. Each side is labeled 12 meters.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6d86bc714a76be88ed1f3973783ce68b54d6740d)

**Classify the shapes.**

Group | Do all of the shapes belong to this group?
-|-
Rhombuses | [[☃ dropdown 1]]
Squares | [[☃ dropdown 2]]
hints:
###What are rhombuses and squares?

A rhombus is a quadrilateral with $4$ equal side lengths.

[[☃ explanation 1]]

A square is a quadrilateral with $4$ equal side lengths and $4$ right angles.

[[☃ explanation 2]]

##Rhombus

All of the shapes are quadrilaterals with equal side lengths.

Yes, all of the shapes are rhombuses!

##Square

The following shape does not have $4$ right angles.

[[☃ image 1]]

No, **not** all of the shapes are squares.

###Completed table

Group | Do all of the shapes belong to this group?
-|-
Rhombuses | Yes
Squares | No

hints:
###What are quadrilaterals and rectangles?

A quadrilateral is a polygon with $4$ sides.

[[☃ explanation 1]]

A rectangle is a quadrilateral with $4$ right angles. 

[[☃ explanation 2]]

##Quadrilateral

All of the shapes are polygons with $4$ sides.  

Yes, all of the shapes are quadrilaterals!

##Rectangles

All of the shapes are quadrilaterals with $4$ right angles.

Yes, all of the shapes are rectangles!

###Completed table

Group | Do all of the shapes belong to this group?
-|-
Quadrilaterals | Yes
Rectangles | Yes
